audio.rule: Replace draft section bounds with clause timestamps measured from the supplied final WAV; do not time-stretch the narration to preserve draft cuts.

visual_rules: Use only real ToxicJoin UI, real DataHub UI, repository, CI, and retained evidence.
Never present hosted Replay as live execution.
Keep Agent Registry footage labeled preview/development channel.
Prefer stable visual holds, deliberate cursor movement, and evidence-first zooms over decorative motion.
No generated product UI, fake DataHub screens, or unsupported claims.

primary_visuals: ToxicJoin title on real product interface
unsafe-query scenario visible in judge cockpit
on_screen_claims: Compositional Privacy Firewall for AI Data Agents
Before the query reaches the warehouse

primary_visuals: BLOCK / REWRITE → ALLOW / ALLOW scenario cards
evidence graph: stable pseudonym + quasi-identifiers + sensitive support category
Rewrite a sensitive churn analysis scenario
original SQL and safe SQL side by side

required_evidence: receipt contains evidence but no result rows

primary_visuals: stable live DataHub evidence page or green Actions proof
required_evidence: Agent → Skill → 5 MCP tools → 5 governed datasets

post_audio_acceptance: Measure exact WAV duration and leading/trailing silence.
Create timestamped clause transcript from the actual waveform.
Bind each section to spoken clauses, allowing section lengths to move.
Build captions from the reviewed technical transcript.
Run full-video factual review against claims-evidence-map.md.
Verify final duration under 180 seconds and 1920×1080/30fps export.
Watch the final encoded video end-to-end before creating a public upload link.
